source_files: game.html mountEnvironment — ground was inlined per-scene; substrate makes it a Thinga
notes: 80x80m plane just slightly under the world-params grid (size 60) so the GridHelper lines still read on top. y_offset -0.01 keeps z-fighting away.
Dark concrete (0x201826 = 2105894) — fits the existing fog tone (bg 0x0b0d12).
rotation_x = -PI/2 lays the plane flat (PlaneGeometry is XY by default; the engine's ground is XZ).
Build_mesh extended this iter to honor rotation; first kind that uses it.
